parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.opportunities.map(o => ({ name: o.name, category: o.category, source_tier: o.source_tier, source_url: o.source_url || null, description: o.scoring_notes, target_market: o.target_market, revenue_ceiling_test: o.revenue_ceiling_test, demand_evidence: o.demand_evidence, feasibility_ai_build: o.feasibility_ai_build, monetization_clarity: o.monetization_clarity, competition_gap: o.competition_gap, distribution_viability: o.distribution_viability, data_lockin_potential: o.data_lockin_potential || null, ai_enhancement_potential: o.ai_enhancement_potential || null, revenue_ceiling: o.revenue_ceiling || null, time_to_revenue: o.time_to_revenue || null, vertical_scalability: o.vertical_scalability || null, overall_score: o.overall_score, status: o.overall_score >= 6.5 ? 'scored_pass' : 'scored_fail', scored_at: $json.timestamp }))) }}
